## Problem

What workflow is currently awkward or missing?

## Proposed Improvement

What should VoiceDex do instead?

## Why It Matters

Explain the operator benefit or user-facing outcome.

## Constraints

Call out anything relevant about permissions, packaging, APIs, or macOS-native behavior.
